evals.prompt: plan.md에 정의된 3개 Phase를 worktree 격리 방식으로 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: Branch 헤더 검증, worktree 생성, phase별 실행, merge, 정리
expectations: Validates owner_agent references exist in agents/*.md
Creates git worktree for task isolation
Runs git merge --no-ff after each phase completion

evals.prompt: plan.md에 Phase 2개가 있는데, Phase-1은 병렬 태스크 3개야. 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: Phase-1 병렬 실행, Phase-2 순차, worktree 격리
expectations: Spawns multiple agents concurrently for parallel tasks
Creates separate worktree for each parallel task
Waits for all Phase-1 tasks before starting Phase-2
Uses git merge --no-ff for each completed task

evals.prompt: plan.md를 실행하는데 Branch 헤더가 빠져있어. 어떻게 처리해?
evals.expected_output: Branch 헤더 누락 감지, 사용자에게 확인, 자동 생성 또는 에러
expectations: Detects missing Branch: header in plan.md
Does not proceed without valid plan headers
